title: Neonauclea cordatula

As a member of the Rubiaceae family, Neonauclea cordatula is part of a large group of flowering plants that have characteristic features such as small, often fragrant flowers and a distinctive inflorescence. Further classification of Neonauclea cordatula includes its species classification as Neonauclea cordatula.
